title: CCL - Put the app in the background
scenario: CCL setting persists correctly when app is backgrounded and foregrounded in Device Settings > Advanced
steps: 2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Advanced.
4. Press the Home button or recent apps button to put the app into the background.
5. Wait a few seconds, then bring the app back to the foreground (e.g., tap the app icon or select it from recent apps).
6. Navigate back to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Advanced.
7. Observe the currently selected CCL setting.
expected: The previously selected CCL setting (e.g., Call) is still displayed correctly in Device Settings > Advanced.
